dropped_features.reason: Non-transferable. CIC-IDS-2017 PortScan rows carry all TCP flags zero, but a real port scan sets SYN, so the model learned a dataset artifact that cannot hold at serving time: 1.00 recall on dataset PortScan rows, zero detections on live scan traffic. Removed 2026-07-16.

threshold_note: Chosen by the validation frontier sweep; config.CLASSIFY_THRESHOLD must be kept equal to this value or serving no longer matches the metrics.
class_weighting: w ~ 1/n^alpha per class (benign is a class), alpha=0.5 for the shipped GBT. alpha and threshold were chosen by maximising validation macro recall subject to per-flow benign FPR <= 0.01; see metrics.json operating_point/frontier.

operating_point.selection: Maximises validation macro recall (0.7464) subject to per-flow benign FPR <= 0.01 (achieved 0.00148).

cnn_operating_point.note: The baseline Conv1D's OWN frontier point under the same FPR budget -- used only in metrics.json's benchmark. The serving threshold (config.CLASSIFY_THRESHOLD) belongs to the primary GBT; switching PRIMARY_MODEL_TYPE to cnn would require this threshold instead.
cnn_operating_point.selection: Maximises validation macro recall (0.2953) subject to per-flow benign FPR <= 0.01 (achieved 0.009836).
